ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_params" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "optimizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer used in the experiment */,
  "lr_scheduler_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning rate scheduler used in the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model used */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the experiment */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Split ratio for training, validation, and testing data */,
  "params" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional parameters of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment parameters */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment parameters */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "train_avg_loss" REAL /* Average training loss */,
  "train_acc" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "test_avg_loss" REAL /* Average testing loss */,
  "test_acc" REAL /* Testing accuracy */,
  "validation_avg_loss" REAL /* Average validation loss */,
  "validation_acc" REAL /* Validation accuracy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric entry */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "epoch")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the access entry */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_collaborators" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaborator entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the collaborator entry */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaborator entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)
